item.title: Zendesk Knowledge Management Portfolio
item.description: Built a full-featured knowledge base with 6+ articles, automation workflows, and analytics framework for legal tech documentation

item.title: Bored API Documentation
item.description: Professional API documentation with quick start guide, endpoint reference, and code examples for developers

item.title: User Guide - CourseCorrect

item.title: Simple Knowledge Bases
item.description: Comprehensive (unofficial) KB documentation for CourseCorrect, structured with 4 main categories covering getting started, how-to guides, FAQs, and troubleshooting.
